item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love the idea that it has a hostile response to officers and yet a sorrow response towards soldiers. The idea of the nonstandard interview is what really sealed in the +1 from me. Very creative and very well written

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I’ve been on a bit of a history kick lately, and Zone Rouge was just too interesting a place not to incorporate it into this SCP. I hope you enjoy reading!

Huge thanks to PMCD for going above and beyond the call of duty when criticizing this in the chat. The title of Guide to Feral Exorcism: Eviscerating Malevolent Spirits from Animals came from him, as well as some other ideas I incorporated. He’s the best.

Thanks also to Rimple, Voct, GibberingEloquence, LordStonefish and Zolgamax for their extremely helpful criticism in chat!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Love this. There's some great characterization in the photo tests, which is especially impressive given how restrained the response descriptions are. Nice work.
